task_completion.description: Agent uses KStars/INDI to capture LIGHT frames for the targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars application and Ekos capture module open, showing a capture sequence queue, telescope control, or FITS viewer for the specified Messier objects.

task_completion.description: Agent executes the sky view capture script with the correct palettes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window showing the execution of 'bash ~/capture_sky_view.sh' with the correct output paths (e.g., /home/ga/Outreach/M42/sky_view.png) and the specified '--palette' arguments (hubble, enhanced, narrowband, vibrant, cool).

task_completion.description: Agent organizes the captured files into the correct target directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal 'ls' output showing the directories M42, M31, M1, M57, and M51 inside '/home/ga/Outreach/'. These directories should contain .fits files and a sky_view.png file.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the HTML gallery file with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or web browser showing the file '/home/ga/Outreach/gallery.html'. The HTML code or the rendered page must include the title 'Jewels of the Night Sky'.

task_completion.description: Agent populates the HTML gallery with the required object details and images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the HTML source code or rendered web page displaying the 5 Messier designations (M42, M31, M1, M57, M51), their corresponding common names (Orion Nebula, Andromeda Galaxy, etc.), and image elements ( tags) referencing the 'sky_view.png' files for each object.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture the FITS images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the KStars GUI is visible in screenshots and used to interact with the simulated CCD/telescope, rather than the agent using 'touch' or other terminal commands to create fake .fits files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent ran the provided bash script to generate the PNGs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the terminal history for the actual execution of 'capture_sky_view.sh', ensuring the agent didn't manually download images from a web browser to bypass the script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually constructed the HTML gallery.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or terminal echo/cat commands being used to write the HTML code, showing genuine interaction to build the gallery.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Targets: M42, M31, M1, M57, M51. Required FITS per target: 3 (min size 1024 bytes). PNG min size: 50000 bytes. Gallery path: /home/ga/Outreach/gallery.html. The sky_view.png files must be generated using the capture_sky_view.sh script with specific palettes (M42: hubble, M31: enhanced, M1: narrowband, M57: vibrant, M51: cool).
